issues.description: Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect text says 'a Character' with no player restriction. Should be 'ChooseCharacter' to allow selecting from either player's board.

Condition uses 'maxPower:7000' but effect text specifies '7000 base power' exactly or up to. The maxPower filter should clarify if this is <=7000 or ==7000. Based on standard wording 'with 7000 base power', this likely means exactly 7000, not up to 7000.
